briefdescription.para: Look up table of exponential values between 0 and 8 represented in Q10 format.
Look up table of exponential values between 0 and -12 represented in Q17 format.
Look up table of exponential values between 0 and 1 in steps of 0.0078125 represented in Q14 format.
Look up table of exponential values between 0 and 0.0078125 in steps of 0.0000019073486328125 represented in Q22 format.
Look up table for division in Q16 format.
Compute exponential of positive values in fixed-point Q12 format.

detaileddescription.para: This function computes e^x for positive values where x is represented in Q12 fixed-point format. Uses lookup tables for fast calculation.

parameterdescription.para: Positive short value of x represented in Q12 format

simplesect.para: Positive integer in Q22 fixed-point format representing e^x
Input range is limited to prevent overflow (maximum ~6.9)

briefdescription.para: Compute exponential of negative values in fixed-point Q12 format.

detaileddescription.para: This function computes e^(-x) for negative values where x is represented in Q12 fixed-point format. Uses lookup tables for fast calculation.

parameterdescription.para: Positive short value of -x represented in Q12 format

simplesect.para: Positive integer in Q31 fixed-point format representing e^(-x)
Input range is limited to prevent underflow (maximum -11)

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned exp_value, short k_type, unsigned int Q_fact, char *Q_exp)
memberdef.name: XVWarpInit_ExponentialFact

briefdescription.para: Compute exponential of fractional number in fixed-point format.

detaileddescription.para: This function computes e^x for fractional numbers given in fixed-point format. Handles both positive and negative exponents.

parameterdescription.para: Integer value for calculating e^x in Q_fact fixed-point
Pointer to return the fixed-point format of result

simplesect.para: Positive integer in Q_exp fixed-point format representing e^x
Function automatically clamps input values to valid range

briefdescription.para: Count leading zeros in a positive integer.

detaileddescription.para: This function counts the number of leading zeros in the given positive integer value, effectively finding the position of the most significant bit.

simplesect.para: Can use built-in compiler intrinsic if USE_BUILTIN_CLZ is defined

briefdescription.para: Compute inverse of a positive short value.

detaileddescription.para: This function computes 1/x for positive short values in fixed-point format using a lookup table for efficient calculation.

parameterdescription.para: Integer value for calculating 1/x in QM.(16-M) fixed-point format
Integer part bit count of value x
Pointer to return fractional bits in result

simplesect.para: Inverse of value x in Q(16-N).N fixed-point format
Returns maximum value from lookup table if x is zero

briefdescription.para: Compute square root of a positive integer.

detaileddescription.para: This function computes the square root of a positive integer using a digit-by-digit calculation algorithm for integer values.

parameterdescription.para: Integer value for calculating square root

simplesect.para: Uses iterative binary search algorithm for 16-bit precision
